description:
This image captures a serene night scene in a room with a window overlooking the street. The room is bathed in soft, dim light that casts long shadows and highlights the textures of the objects within. 

In the foreground, there's a bed draped with a black comforter that stands out starkly against the lighter surroundings. A white pillow rests on the bed, providing a contrast to the dark comforter. The bed is positioned such that it seems to be in front of the window.

The window, framed by a white sill and a yellow curtain, offers a view of the street outside. Through the window, you can see the silhouette of trees standing tall against the night sky. A car parked on the side of the road adds another element to the scene.

To the left of the bed, there's a black chair, its color matching that of the comforter and creating a sense of harmony in the room's decoration. The overall atmosphere is one of tranquility and quietness, as if time has slowed down within this space.
